<script>
    const navigation = document.querySelector(".navigation");
    const burgerMenu = document.querySelector(".icon-tabler-menu");
    const burgerX = document.querySelector(".icon-tabler-x");
    burgerMenu.onclick = function(){
        navigation.style.display = "block";
        burgerX.style.display = "block";
        burgerMenu.style.display = "none";
        navigation.classList.remove("navigation--mobile--fadeout");
        navigation.classList.toggle("navigation--mobile");
    }
    burgerX.onclick = function(){
        navigation.style.display = "none";
        burgerX.style.display = "none";
        burgerMenu.style.display = "block";
        navigation.classList.toggle("navigation--mobile--fadeout");
        navigation.classList.remove("navigation--mobile");

    }
    var cate = window.location.pathname.split("/").slice(-1);
    var category = cate[0]
    var cateNow = document.getElementsByClassName(category)
    if (cateNow && cateNow.length > 0) {
        cateNow[0].setAttribute("class","navli active "+category);
        var popular = document.getElementsByClassName("popular")[0]
        popular.setAttribute("class","navli popular")
    }

</script>

    <script>
        var isMobile = "pc" === "mobile";
        function ajax(options) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
                const params = formsParams(options.data);

                if (options.type === "GET") {
                    xhr.open(options.type, `${options.url}?${params}`, options.async);
                    xhr.send();
                } else if (options.type === "POST") {
                    xhr.open(options.type, options.url, options.async);
                    xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json;charset=utf-8");
                    xhr.send(JSON.stringify(options.data));
                }

                xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (xhr.readyState === 4) {
                        if (xhr.status === 200) {
                            resolve(xhr.responseText);
                        } else {
                            reject(new Error(`Request failed with status ${xhr.status}`));
                        }
                    }
                };

                xhr.onerror = () => reject(new Error('Request failed'));
            });
        }

        function formsParams(data) {
            if (!data) return '';
            return Object.entries(data)
                .map(([key, value]) => `${encodeURIComponent(key)}=${encodeURIComponent(value)}`)
                .join('&');
        }

        const cookieContainer = document.querySelector('.cookie-notice-container');
        if (cookieContainer && !document.cookie.includes('AgreeCookies')) {
            cookieContainer.style.display = "block";
        } else if (cookieContainer) {
            cookieContainer.style.display = "none";
        }

        function addCookie() {
            const COOKIE_NAME = 'AgreeCookies';
            const COOKIE_VALUE = 'agreed';
            const DAYS_TO_EXPIRE = 30;
            
            function setCookie(name, value, days) {
                const date = new Date();
                date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
                const expires = `expires=${date.toUTCString()}`;
                document.cookie = `${name}=${value}; ${expires}; path=/`;
            }

            setCookie(COOKIE_NAME, COOKIE_VALUE, DAYS_TO_EXPIRE);
            if (cookieContainer) {
                cookieContainer.style.display = "none";
            }
        }

        function lazyImg() {
            const imageObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        const img = entry.target;
                        const src = img.getAttribute('data-src');
                        if (src) {
                            img.src = src;
                            img.removeAttribute('data-src');
                            imageObserver.unobserve(img);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }, {
                rootMargin: '50px 0px'
            });

            document.querySelectorAll('.lazyImg').forEach(img => {
                imageObserver.observe(img);
            });
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', lazyImg);
        } else {
            lazyImg();
        }
    </script>

    <script>
        
        let page = 1;
        let pageCount = 1;
        var loading = document.getElementsByClassName("loading")[0];
        var viewHeight = document.documentElement.clientHeight;
        function GetRect(element) {
            let rectbox = element.getBoundingClientRect();
            let top = document.documentElement.clientTop ? document.documentElement.clientTop : 0;
            let left = document.documentElement.clientLeft ? document.documentElement.clientLeft : 0;
            return {
                top: rectbox.top - top,
                bottom: rectbox.bottom - top,
                left: rectbox.left - left,
                right: rectbox.right - left
            }
        }
        let footerWrap = document.querySelector('.footerWrap');
        let isLoading = false;

        window.onscroll = function() {
            if(isLoading) return;
            
            let obj = GetRect(footerWrap);
            if (obj.top < viewHeight && obj.bottom >= viewHeight) {
                if(page < pageCount){
                    isLoading = true;
                    getIndexList().then(() => {
                        isLoading = false;
                    });
                }
            }
        };

        async function getIndexList(){
            const newUl = isMobile ? 
                document.getElementById('MLastListCont') :
                document.getElementById('PCLastListCont');
                
            try {
                const response = await fetch(`/get/category/api?page=${page}&pageSize=15&category=${category}`);
                const indexList = await response.json();
                
                if(indexList.GameAppStructList && indexList.GameAppStructList.length > 0) {
                    pageCount = indexList.PageCount;
                    
                    indexList.GameAppStructList.forEach((item, index) => {
                        moreLi(item, newUl);
                    });
                    
                    lazyImg();
                    page++;
                }
            } catch(err) {
                console.error('Failed to fetch data:', err);
            }
        }

        
        function moreLi(moreData,ulBox){
            var li = document.createElement('li');
            li.setAttribute("class","firstUnordered-item");
            var A = document.createElement('a');
            A.setAttribute("class","coverlink");
            if(moreData.AndroidPackageName !== ''){
                A.setAttribute("href","/app?app=" + moreData.AndroidPackageName);
            } else {
                A.setAttribute("href","/game/" + moreData.GameID);
            }
            var appIcon = document.createElement('img');
            appIcon.setAttribute("class","appIcon lazyImg");
            appIcon.setAttribute("src","/static/image/loading.png");
            appIcon.setAttribute("data-src",moreData.Logo);
            appIcon.setAttribute("alt","");
            var appName = document.createElement('div');
            appName.setAttribute("class","appName");
            appName.innerHTML = moreData.Name;
            li.appendChild(A);
            li.appendChild(appIcon);
            li.appendChild(appName);
            ulBox.appendChild(li);
        }
        getIndexList();

    </script>
</body>
</html>
